activeShape: explicit translation-object rows with NRSV base, KJV/NABRE addition lanes, and DRB source-address addition lanes

ordinaryDanielNRSV.scope: Daniel 1-12 ordinary Daniel rows, re-synced verse-for-verse to canonical daniel.json's own NRSV column (fully source-verified against NRSV-CI 2026-07-13) rather than left on the prior internal-baseline text.
ordinaryDanielNRSV.note: Supersedes the original internal-baseline claim below -- 357 verses re-synced. Original note retained for history: this file's ordinary NRSV had previously only been checked against canonical daniel.json's own (then-unverified) NRSV text, not an external source; canonical daniel.json's NRSV is now itself source-verified, so this sync closes that gap.

additionKJV.scope: Prayer of Azariah/Song of Three Jews, Susanna, and Bel and the Dragon addition lanes only.

additionNABRE.scope: Prayer/Song, Susanna, and Bel and the Dragon addition lanes only.

additionDRB.scope: Prayer/Song Daniel 3:24-90, Susanna/transition Daniel 13:1-65, and Bel and the Dragon Daniel 14:1-42.

additionNRSV.scope: Prayer of Azariah/Song of Three Jews, Susanna, and Bel and the Dragon NRSV addition text, audited and fixed against NRSV-CI.SQLite3 (book_numbers 323, 325, 345).
additionNRSV.note: Resolves the prior blocked status. NRSV-CI was not previously known to contain these three addition books as separate entries; it does. 13 real wording/boundary fixes applied to the Prayer of Azariah/Song lane (including a misplaced clause restored to its correct verse), 34 to Susanna (including a three-verse clause-boundary correction at 13:28-30), 15 to Bel and the Dragon (including a misplaced clause restored at 14:4-5). Ordinary (non-addition) NRSV rows in this file were also re-synced to the now-fully-verified canonical daniel.json (357 verses) rather than left on the older internal-baseline text.

fullGreekDanielAllLanes.reason: All lanes (KJV, NABRE, DRB from the 2026-06-28 collation; NRSV newly verified 2026-07-13) are now source-collated. Two NABRE chapter-heading-pollution instances (13:1, 14:1) also found and fixed during this pass, and the whole NABRE column re-swept for the established LORD/GOD-casing-plus-stray-space bug (none found beyond the two heading instances).

allowedClaims: Greek Daniel ordinary Daniel 1-12 NRSV is internally baseline-verified against canonical Daniel NRSV under the insertion mapping.
Greek Daniel KJV addition lanes are exact-source-collated for Prayer of Azariah, Susanna, and Bel and the Dragon.
Greek Daniel NABRE addition lanes are exact-source-collated for Prayer/Song, Susanna, and Bel and the Dragon.
Greek Daniel DRB addition/source-address lanes are exact-source-collated under the DRB source-address policy.
Greek Daniel NRSV addition lanes are source-verified against NRSV-CI as of 2026-07-13.
Greek Daniel is fully trusted across all lanes as of 2026-07-13.
forbiddenClaims: Oremus candidates are bound NRSV source witnesses.
Canonical Daniel internal baseline replaces an external/source witness for NRSV additions.
nextRequiredWork: Acquire or approve NRSV source witnesses for Greek Daniel additions before NRSV addition collation.
Continue Greek Esther source acquisition and address mapping.
Keep deuterocanon/non-Protestant canon status partial until remaining Greek additions and Greek Esther are source-collated or explicitly governed as source-absent.
